label: Freshdesk
description: Read and manage Freshdesk support tickets, contacts, and agents via the Freshdesk REST API.

form.title: Connect Freshdesk
form.subtitle: Paste your Freshdesk API key and subdomain to give Anton access to your help desk.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste your Freshdesk API key and subdomain. Anton authenticates via HTTP Basic using your API key as the username — no OAuth setup required.
methods.how_to:
## Connect with a Freshdesk API Key

Freshdesk issues a personal API key per agent account. Anton sends it as the HTTP Basic username (with the literal string `X` as the password), which is the standard Freshdesk auth pattern.

### Steps

1. Log in to your Freshdesk account (e.g. `https://yourcompany.freshdesk.com`).
2. Click your **avatar / profile picture** in the top-right corner.
3. Select **Profile settings** from the dropdown.
4. Scroll to the bottom of the profile page — you'll see your **API Key** in the right-hand panel.
5. Click the copy icon or select the key text and copy it.
6. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below.
7. Enter your subdomain in the **Subdomain** field — just the prefix, e.g. `yourcompany` from `yourcompany.freshdesk.com`.

### Notes

- The API key is tied to the agent account that generated it. Actions Anton takes (e.g. creating tickets) will appear as that agent.
- If you regenerate your API key in Freshdesk, you must update it here — the old key is immediately revoked.
- Freshdesk also supports using your account **password** instead of the API key, but the API key is preferred and more stable.
- Admin-level agents can access all tickets; restricted agents may see only tickets assigned to them depending on your Freshdesk plan and permissions.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found under your Freshdesk Profile settings → API Key section at the bottom of the page.

fields.name: subdomain
fields.label: Subdomain
fields.description: The prefix of your Freshdesk URL — e.g. enter 'yourcompany' if your URL is yourcompany.freshdesk.com.
